REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-21-2025. ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** HOOTAN ATEFYEKTA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ROBERT SCHOEN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. PARTIES WERE SENT BACK FROM DEPARTMENT 306. DEFENDANT REQUESTS THE CASE BE DISMISSED. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS FOR A CONTINUANCE. COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S REQUEST AND ORDERS THE CASE BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR THE REASON THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT READY TO PROCEED WITH TRIAL. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE IS DENIED.
